data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for per-value labels, descriptions, sort order, and active/inactive flags.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific attributes related to biz-defined status sets, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding these attributes. The prior steps focus on creating resources and managing bookings, but they do not address the specific requirement of validating the status vocabulary as defined in the use case. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of validation for biz-defined status sets.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
